message:
fix: set BD_DOLT_AUTO_COMMIT=off for polecat environments (gt-5cc2p)

Disable Dolt auto-commit for polecats to prevent manifest contention
when 16+ concurrent polecats fire DOLT_COMMIT simultaneously, causing
Dolt to enter read-only mode. With branch-per-polecat, individual
commits are pointless — all changes merge at gt done time via DOLT_MERGE.

Changes:
- config/env.go: Add BD_DOLT_AUTO_COMMIT=off to polecat AgentEnv
- polecat/session_manager.go: Prepend BD_DOLT_AUTO_COMMIT=off to
  startup command and set in tmux session environment
- config/env_test.go: Add test assertion for new env var

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -79,6 +79,11 @@ func AgentEnv(cfg AgentEnvConfig) map[string]string {
 		env["GT_POLECAT"] = cfg.AgentName
 		env["BD_ACTOR"] = fmt.Sprintf("%s/polecats/%s", cfg.Rig, cfg.AgentName)
 		env["GIT_AUTHOR_NAME"] = cfg.AgentName
+		// Disable Dolt auto-commit for polecats. With branch-per-polecat,
+		// individual commits are pointless — all changes merge at gt done time
+		// via DOLT_MERGE. Without this, concurrent polecats cause manifest
+		// contention leading to Dolt read-only mode (gt-5cc2p).
+		env["BD_DOLT_AUTO_COMMIT"] = "off"
 
 	case "crew":
 		env["GT_ROLE"] = fmt.Sprintf("%s/crew/%s", cfg.Rig, cfg.AgentName)
